titleStmt.title: SII 32, part 2, no. 108: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 108. (A.R. No. 583 of 1920.) UḌAIYĀRKUḌI, CHIDAMBARAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the north wall, central shrine, Ananteśvarasvāmin temple.

Incomplete and damaged. It records the gift of an areca garden and some more pieces of land to provide for the daily supply of 150 arecanuts and three paṟṟu of betel leaves and also for the supply of camphor at the three sandhis in the temple of Tiruvanantīśvarattu-paramēśvara at Vīranārāyaṇa-chaturvēdimaṅgalam, by a resident of the village by name Mātṛidāsa-kramavittan, son of Tiruvanantīśvara-kramavittan of Pullaḷūr.
Published in S.I.I., Vol. XIX No. 304.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī .
kopparakeśari
panmarkku yāṇṭu
10 2 Āvatu vaṭaka
rai brahmadeyam
śrī viranārāyaṇacca
turvvetitimaṅkalattu
śrī cariceripu
ḷḷaḷūr tiruvaṉan=tīśvara
kkiramavittan makan māti
rutāsakkiramavittaneṉ I
vvūr tiruvaṉan=tīśvara muṭai
ya paramiśvararkku tirikālam
muṉṟu santikku potuyvatāka nicatam ṉūṟṟa
ṟupatu kāy Amutukku potoru paṟṟāka nicatam teriyilai paṟṟu muṉṟukkum Āṭṭai viṭṭa Ira
ṇṭu kāciṉ kaṟpūra vai Aṉaittuttukkumāka kuṭutta nilamāvatu Ivvūr vaṭapiṭākai viranā
rāyaṇavatikku teṟkku nālāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu mutal catirattu melai Aṟu
māvil viranārāyaṇacceri savāṇai ccaturvveti bhaṭṭāra Aṭṭakat tārkku muṉti kaipa
ṭṭa teṟkkaṭainta Oru mā mukkāṇiyil teṟka rai māvarai
vaṭakkil Araimā Araikkāṇi Arai muntirikaiyil kiḻakkaṭaiya kāṇi muntirikai kāl
vattaṉaiyāl Uṭaiya nilam Ikkamukam
toṭṭamum Ippiṭākaiyil rāmatevavatikku meṟku cantraśekaravāykkālukku vaṭakku mutal kaṇṇāṟ
ṟu mutal catirattu māṉakulakāla(cala)ceri kuṇṭūr tirunārāyaṇa bhaṭṭa comāciyāruḷḷiṭṭa Aṣṭakattomukkuppaṭṭa
muṉṟu māvil melkkaṭaiya nāṉ ṉappaṉār pakkalk kūṟupeṟṟuṭaiya mukkāṇi Araikkāṇiyarai muntirikai nilam
Ivvatikke meṟkku Ivvāykkālukke vaṭakku śrī viraśrī kāmukacceri surasārampi mutta bhaṭṭaruḷḷiṭṭa A
ṣṭakattārkku paṭṭa muṉṟu māvil nāṉ Emappaṉār pakkal kūṟu peṟṟuṭaiya kāṇi Araikkāṇiy Āka nilam mākkāṇiya
yarai muntirikai nilamum kamukam toṭṭam nilam kāṇi muntirikaiyum tiruvaṉan=tiśvaramuṭaiya paraThe continuation is not traceable.
Digital edition of SII 32, part 2, no. 108 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
